example: The disappearance of the ancient civilization remains a mystery to this day.
exampleZh: 这个古代文明的消失至今仍然是个谜。

example: He always speaks in a calm and polite manner even during heated discussions.
exampleZh: 即使在激烈的讨论中，他也总是以冷静礼貌的方式说话。

example: The two countries have agreed to open the border for trade and travel.
exampleZh: 两国已同意开放边境进行贸易和旅行。

example: She wrote some helpful notes in the margin of her textbook while studying.
exampleZh: 她在学习时在课本的页边空白处写了一些有用的笔记。

example: The park provides excellent facilities for outdoor recreation and family picnics.
exampleZh: 这个公园为户外娱乐和家庭野餐提供了极好的设施。

example: She spends her leisure time reading novels and painting landscapes in her studio.
exampleZh: 她在空闲时间阅读小说并在工作室里画风景画。

example: After working for forty years, my grandfather plans to retire next spring.
exampleZh: 工作了四十年后，我祖父计划明年春天退休。

example: The entire class cheered with excitement when the teacher announced the field trip.
exampleZh: 当老师宣布郊游时，全班同学都兴奋地欢呼起来。

example: Space exploration represents the final frontier of human scientific discovery and adventure.
exampleZh: 太空探索代表了人类科学发现和冒险的最终前沿。

example: The computer program selects a random number between one and one hundred each time.
exampleZh: 计算机程序每次在一到一百之间选择一个随机数。

example: The river forms a natural boundary between the two neighboring countries in the region.
exampleZh: 这条河构成了该地区两个邻国之间的天然边界。

example: The bus fare in the city has increased by two dollars since last month.
exampleZh: 自上个月以来，市内的公交车票价上涨了两美元。

example: Her colleagues threw a farewell party on her last day at the office.
exampleZh: 她的同事在她上班的最后一天为她举办了一个欢送会。

example: The government has increased spending on social welfare programs for low-income families.
exampleZh: 政府增加了针对低收入家庭的社会福利项目支出。

example: The poet used many obscure references that only scholars could fully understand.
exampleZh: 这位诗人使用了许多只有学者才能完全理解的晦涩典故。

example: His explanation was far too vague and left everyone feeling confused and uncertain.
exampleZh: 他的解释太过模糊，让每个人都感到困惑和不确定。

example: The heavy rain began to blur the view through the car's front windshield.
exampleZh: 大雨开始模糊了汽车前挡风玻璃的视线。

example: The experienced teacher readily offered to help the new colleague with the lesson plan.
exampleZh: 这位经验丰富的老师乐意地主动帮助新同事备课。

example: Despite the heavy traffic, she still managed to arrive at the airport on time.
exampleZh: 尽管交通拥堵，她仍然设法准时到达了机场。

example: The federal government passed a new law to protect the environment across the nation.
exampleZh: 联邦政府通过了一项新法律来保护全国各地的环境。

example: The primary function of the heart is to pump blood throughout the entire body.
exampleZh: 心脏的主要功能是将血液泵送到全身。

example: The fashion show featured the latest clothing designs from top international designers.
exampleZh: 这场时装秀展示了来自顶尖国际设计师的最新服装设计。

example: Each artist has a unique style that sets their work apart from all the others.
exampleZh: 每位艺术家都有独特的风格，使他们的作品与众不同。

example: The labor union negotiated with management for better wages and improved working conditions.
exampleZh: 工会与管理层就提高工资和改善工作条件进行了谈判。

example: The team's unity and mutual support helped them overcome every obstacle they faced.
exampleZh: 团队的团结和相互支持帮助他们克服了面临的每一个障碍。

example: The immune system helps the body fight off viruses that attack healthy cells.
exampleZh: 免疫系统帮助身体抵抗攻击健康细胞的病毒。

example: He was filled with rage when he discovered that his car had been stolen.
exampleZh: 当他发现自己的车被偷走时，他充满了愤怒。

example: Science fiction is a popular genre of literature that imagines future technologies and worlds.
exampleZh: 科幻小说是一种流行的文学体裁，想象未来的技术和世界。

example: The leader worked tirelessly to unify the divided nation after years of civil war.
exampleZh: 这位领导人不知疲倦地努力在内战多年后统一这个分裂的国家。

example: The citizens were indignant about the unfair treatment of the local community by officials.
exampleZh: 市民们对官员不公平对待当地社区感到愤慨。

example: The villagers were incredibly hospitable and welcomed us into their homes for dinner.
exampleZh: 村民们非常热情好客，欢迎我们到他们家里吃晚饭。

example: She placed the family photograph in a beautiful wooden frame on the mantelpiece.
exampleZh: 她把那张全家福照片放进一个漂亮的木制相框里，放在壁炉台上。

example: The diamond ring sparkled brilliantly under the bright lights of the jewelry store.
exampleZh: 钻石戒指在珠宝店明亮的灯光下璀璨闪耀。

example: Turn left at the junction where the main road meets the narrow country lane.
exampleZh: 在主干道与狭窄乡村小路交汇的交叉口向左转。

example: Archaeologists discovered a small fragment of pottery dating back over two thousand years.
exampleZh: 考古学家发现了一小块可追溯到两千多年前的陶器碎片。

example: Please handle the glass vase with care because it is extremely fragile and valuable.
exampleZh: 请小心处理这个玻璃花瓶，因为它非常脆弱且珍贵。

example: Young children are especially vulnerable to the harmful effects of air pollution.
exampleZh: 年幼的儿童特别容易受到空气污染的有害影响。

example: After a long illness, the old man was too feeble to walk without any assistance.
exampleZh: 久病之后，老人虚弱得无法在没有帮助的情况下行走。

example: The manager asked the team to execute the new marketing strategy as quickly as possible.
exampleZh: 经理要求团队尽快执行新的营销策略。

example: The museum displayed an exquisite collection of ancient Chinese porcelain from the Ming dynasty.
exampleZh: 博物馆展出了一批精美的明代中国古瓷器藏品。

example: The hacker tried to manipulate the company's computer system to steal sensitive financial data.
exampleZh: 黑客试图操纵公司的计算机系统以窃取敏感的财务数据。

example: A pocket knife is a very handy tool to have when you go camping in the woods.
exampleZh: 在树林里露营时，随身带一把小刀是非常方便的工具。

example: It was a great honor for her to receive the award in front of so many people.
exampleZh: 在这么多人面前领奖对她来说是极大的荣誉。

example: As a child, her favorite fantasy was to fly like a bird over the mountains.
exampleZh: 小时候，她最喜欢的幻想就是像鸟一样飞越群山。

example: The magician created the illusion that the coin had completely disappeared into thin air.
exampleZh: 魔术师制造了硬币完全凭空消失的幻觉。

example: Hundreds of candles were used to illuminate the old church during the evening ceremony.
exampleZh: 在晚间的仪式上，数百支蜡烛被用来照亮这座古老的教堂。

example: She took a fancy to the little black puppy at the animal shelter immediately.
exampleZh: 她立刻喜欢上了动物收容所里那只黑色的小狗。

example: It rained so much this month that we practically needed a boat to get around.
exampleZh: 这个月下了太多雨，我们几乎需要一艘船才能出门。

example: Many students attended the virtual classroom session from their homes during the pandemic.
exampleZh: 疫情期间，许多学生在家参加了虚拟课堂。

example: The police are working hard to ascertain the exact cause of the mysterious fire.
exampleZh: 警方正在努力查明这场神秘火灾的确切原因。

example: The document must be signed by a notary to certify that the signature is genuine.
exampleZh: 该文件必须由公证人签字以证明签名是真实的。

example: The experienced diplomat successfully negotiated a peace agreement between the two warring nations.
exampleZh: 这位经验丰富的外交官成功地在两个交战国之间谈判达成了和平协议。

example: The human brain is an incredibly complex organ that scientists still do not fully understand.
exampleZh: 人脑是一个极其复杂的器官，科学家们仍然没有完全理解它。

example: The reporter raised dubious claims that could not be supported by any real evidence.
exampleZh: 记者提出了一些可疑的说法，这些说法没有任何真实证据支持。

example: The literal meaning of this word is quite different from its common everyday usage.
exampleZh: 这个词的字面意思与其日常常用含义有很大不同。

example: The gallery features works by both classical masters and contemporary artists from around the world.
exampleZh: 该画廊展出了古典大师和来自世界各地的当代艺术家的作品。

example: This charitable cause is very worthy of your generous support and kind donation.
exampleZh: 这个慈善事业非常值得你慷慨的支持和善意的捐赠。

example: She entered the national singing contest and won first place among over a thousand competitors.
exampleZh: 她参加了全国歌唱比赛，在一千多名参赛者中获得了第一名。

example: I absolutely detest the smell of cigarette smoke in enclosed public spaces.
exampleZh: 我极其厌恶封闭公共场所里的香烟味。

example: The education reform aims to provide equal learning opportunities for all children in the country.
exampleZh: 教育改革旨在为该国所有儿童提供平等的学习机会。

example: All students are required to wear the school uniform from Monday through Friday each week.
exampleZh: 所有学生每周一至周五都必须穿校服。

example: The committee met to formulate a clear plan for improving community health services.
exampleZh: 委员会开会制定了一个改善社区卫生服务的明确计划。

example: Please call the hotel to confirm your reservation at least one day before arrival.
exampleZh: 请在到达前至少一天致电酒店确认你的预订。

example: The famous architect designed a stunning glass building that became the city's new landmark.
exampleZh: 这位著名建筑师设计了一座令人惊叹的玻璃建筑，成为了城市的新地标。

example: The traditional architecture of this ancient town attracts thousands of tourists every year.
exampleZh: 这个古镇的传统建筑每年吸引成千上万的游客。

example: The secret ingredient in her grandmother's soup made it taste incredibly rich and delicious.
exampleZh: 她祖母汤里的秘密成分使它尝起来格外浓郁美味。

example: Science fiction often explores how advanced technology might change human society in the future.
exampleZh: 科幻小说经常探讨先进技术在未来可能如何改变人类社会。

example: The new policy has brought tangible improvements to the quality of life for residents.
exampleZh: 新政策给居民的生活质量带来了切实的改善。

example: The speaker tried to relate the complex theory to situations in everyday life.
exampleZh: 演讲者试图将复杂的理论与日常生活中的情境联系起来。

example: Studies show that regular exercise strongly correlates with improved mental health and mood.
exampleZh: 研究表明，规律锻炼与改善心理健康和情绪密切相关。

example: She seemed to radiate confidence and happiness wherever she went in the room.
exampleZh: 无论她走到房间的哪个角落，她似乎都散发着自信和快乐。

example: Only a small fraction of the original forest remains after years of extensive logging.
exampleZh: 经过多年的大规模砍伐，原始森林只剩下一小部分。

example: The strange symbols carved on the ancient stone tablet continue to perplex researchers today.
exampleZh: 刻在古代石碑上的奇怪符号至今仍让研究人员感到困惑。

example: She won the prestigious literary award for her debut novel about immigrant family life.
exampleZh: 她凭借关于移民家庭生活的处女作小说获得了这个享有盛誉的文学奖。

example: Many volunteers spent their weekend cleaning up the beach and planting trees along the coast.
exampleZh: 许多志愿者用周末时间清理海滩并在海岸边种树。

example: The two nations signed a historic peace treaty to end decades of armed conflict.
exampleZh: 两国签署了一项历史性的和平条约，结束了数十年的武装冲突。

example: Every citizen has the duty to defend their homeland against any form of external threat.
exampleZh: 每个公民都有义务保卫祖国免受任何形式的外部威胁。

example: Even in the face of great hardship, she never lost her sense of inner dignity.
exampleZh: 即使面对巨大的困难，她也从未失去内心的尊严感。

example: Traveling to different countries can truly broaden your horizon and change your perspective on life.
exampleZh: 去不同的国家旅行可以真正开阔你的视野并改变你对生活的看法。

example: The lightning flashed across the dark sky just moments before the thunder roared loudly.
exampleZh: 闪电在黑暗的天空中划过，片刻之后雷声轰鸣。

example: There has been some friction between the two departments over the allocation of budget.
exampleZh: 两个部门之间在预算分配上产生了一些摩擦。

example: Regular check-ups with your doctor can help detect serious health problems early on.
exampleZh: 定期体检可以帮助及早发现严重的健康问题。

example: All products must conform to the strict safety standards set by the government agency.
exampleZh: 所有产品必须符合政府机构制定的严格安全标准。

example: He did not mean to offend anyone with his remarks, but some people took them badly.
exampleZh: 他无意用他的言论冒犯任何人，但有些人对此感到很不好。

example: The news of the corruption scandal caused widespread public outrage across the entire country.
exampleZh: 腐败丑闻的消息在全国各地引起了广泛的公众愤怒。

example: The training program is designed to orient new employees to the company's core values.
exampleZh: 该培训项目旨在让新员工适应公司的核心价值观。

example: The flame of the candle flickered gently as a soft breeze blew through the open window.
exampleZh: 当柔和的微风从敞开的窗户吹进来时，蜡烛的火焰轻轻摇曳。

example: The match flared briefly in the darkness before the campfire finally caught light.
exampleZh: 火柴在黑暗中短暂地燃烧了一下，然后篝火终于点燃了。

example: She spent the entire weekend reading a fascinating mystery novel set in ancient Rome.
exampleZh: 她花了整个周末读了一本以古罗马为背景的引人入胜的悬疑小说。

example: The children laughed with joy as they blew colorful soap bubbles into the air.
exampleZh: 孩子们欢笑着把五颜六色的肥皂泡吹向空中。

example: Her hands began to tremble with nervousness as she stepped onto the large stage.
exampleZh: 当她踏上大舞台时，她的双手因紧张而开始颤抖。

example: The amiable old shopkeeper always greeted every customer with a warm and friendly smile.
exampleZh: 那位和蔼可亲的老店主总是用热情友好的微笑迎接每一位顾客。

example: Einstein's theory of relativity completely changed our understanding of space and time.
exampleZh: 爱因斯坦的相对论彻底改变了我们对空间和时间的理解。

example: You need a valid driver's license to legally operate a motor vehicle on public roads.
exampleZh: 你需要持有有效的驾驶执照才能在公共道路上合法驾驶机动车。

example: After completing the course, each student received a certificate of achievement at the ceremony.
exampleZh: 完成课程后，每位学生在典礼上获得了一份结业证书。

example: He proudly displayed his university diploma on the wall of his new office downtown.
exampleZh: 他自豪地将大学文凭挂在他市中心新办公室的墙上。

example: The scientist remained skeptical about the extraordinary claims until she saw the solid evidence.
exampleZh: 这位科学家对非凡的说法持怀疑态度，直到她看到确凿的证据。

example: Improving digital literacy among older adults has become an important goal of public education.
exampleZh: 提高老年人的数字素养已成为公共教育的一个重要目标。

example: The company hired twenty temporary workers to help with the busy holiday shopping season.
exampleZh: 公司雇用了二十名临时工来应付繁忙的假日购物季。

example: The government should strictly regulate the use of chemicals in food production and packaging.
exampleZh: 政府应该严格管理食品生产和包装中化学物质的使用。

example: Thousands of students gathered in the square to hold a peaceful protest against the war.
exampleZh: 数千名学生聚集在广场上举行和平抗议，反对战争。

example: Please wear formal attire such as a suit and tie to the business dinner tomorrow evening.
exampleZh: 请穿正装如西装和领带参加明晚的商务晚宴。

example: The internet has managed to transform the way people communicate and access information worldwide.
exampleZh: 互联网已经改变了全世界人们交流和获取信息的方式。

example: The school will inform all parents about the exam schedule at least two weeks beforehand.
exampleZh: 学校将至少提前两周通知所有家长考试时间表。

example: There has been a heated debate about whether the new law would truly benefit society.
exampleZh: 关于新法律是否真正有益于社会，一直存在激烈的辩论。

example: The battle against cancer requires tremendous courage and the support of loved ones.
exampleZh: 与癌症的斗争需要巨大的勇气和亲人的支持。

example: Harvard University enjoys great international prestige as one of the world's top institutions.
exampleZh: 哈佛大学作为世界顶尖学府之一享有很高的国际声望。

example: The professor is held in high esteem by all his students for his dedication and wisdom.
exampleZh: 这位教授因其奉献精神和智慧而受到所有学生的高度尊敬。

example: The mountain is considered sacred by the local tribe and has been protected for centuries.
exampleZh: 这座山被当地部落视为神圣的，几个世纪以来一直受到保护。

example: Learning to write computer code is a valuable skill in today's digital economy and job market.
exampleZh: 在当今的数字经济和就业市场中，学习编写计算机代码是一项宝贵的技能。

example: She started learning to play a musical instrument when she was only five years old.
exampleZh: 她五岁时就开始学习演奏一种乐器。

example: Nobody is perfect, but we can all strive to become better versions of ourselves each day.
exampleZh: 没有人是完美的，但我们都可以每天努力成为更好的自己。

example: The children made a huge mess in the living room while playing with all their toys.
exampleZh: 孩子们在客厅玩玩具时把房间弄得一团糟。

example: The school decided to equip every classroom with a new computer and a projector.
exampleZh: 学校决定为每个教室配备一台新电脑和一台投影仪。

example: The product was recalled because of a serious defect that could potentially cause injury.
exampleZh: 该产品因存在可能导致受伤的严重缺陷而被召回。

example: A single sick person can easily infect dozens of others if proper precautions are not taken.
exampleZh: 如果不采取适当的预防措施，一个病人很容易传染几十个人。

example: Being fluent in two languages gives her a huge advantage in the international job market.
exampleZh: 能流利地说两种语言让她在国际就业市场上拥有巨大的优势。

example: The main shortcoming of this plan is that it requires far more funding than we currently have.
exampleZh: 这个计划的主要缺点是需要比我们目前拥有的多得多的资金。

example: There has been a dramatic surge in demand for renewable energy over the past five years.
exampleZh: 在过去五年中，对可再生能源的需求急剧激增。

example: The financial crisis caused thousands of businesses to close and millions to lose their jobs.
exampleZh: 金融危机导致成千上万的企业倒闭，数百万人失业。

example: The police have launched a thorough investigation into the serious crime that occurred downtown.
exampleZh: 警方已经对发生在市中心的严重犯罪展开了彻底调查。

example: The two railway lines run parallel to each other for nearly fifty miles across the plain.
exampleZh: 这两条铁路线在平原上平行延伸近五十英里。

example: Staring at a bright computer screen for too long can cause eye strain and headaches.
exampleZh: 长时间盯着明亮的电脑屏幕会导致眼睛疲劳和头痛。

example: The sudden power outage caused complete chaos in the busy shopping mall on Saturday afternoon.
exampleZh: 星期六下午，突然的停电在繁忙的购物中心造成了完全混乱。

example: The new medicine had an immediate positive effect on the patient's severe chronic condition.
exampleZh: 这种新药对病人的严重慢性病产生了立竿见影的积极效果。

example: The only drawback of living in the countryside is the lack of convenient public transportation options.
exampleZh: 住在农村唯一的缺点就是缺乏便捷的公共交通选择。

example: The old photograph seemed to evoke powerful memories of her happy childhood in the village.
exampleZh: 这张旧照片似乎唤起了她在村里快乐童年的强烈记忆。

example: A new political leader began to emerge from the chaos and uncertainty of the election period.
exampleZh: 一位新的政治领袖开始从选举期间的混乱和不确定性中浮现出来。

example: She studied finance at university and now works as an investment banker in London.
exampleZh: 她在大学学习金融，现在在伦敦担任投资银行家。

example: The charity organization provides shelter and support for victims of domestic violence and abuse.
exampleZh: 这家慈善机构为家庭暴力和虐待的受害者提供住所和支持。

example: The bride wore a delicate lace veil that covered her face during the wedding ceremony.
exampleZh: 新娘在婚礼上戴着一块精致的蕾丝面纱遮住了脸。

example: The two companies spent several months trying to negotiate the terms of the merger deal.
exampleZh: 两家公司花了几个月的时间试图谈判合并协议的条款。

example: The soldiers underwent intense training before they were sent into active combat overseas.
exampleZh: 士兵们在被派往海外实战之前接受了高强度训练。

example: The criminal was notorious for having escaped from prison three times in the past.
exampleZh: 这个罪犯因过去曾三次越狱而臭名昭著。

example: Attention deficit disorder can make it very difficult for children to focus in school.
exampleZh: 注意力缺陷障碍会使孩子在学校很难集中注意力。

example: The lack of sleep can seriously affect your ability to concentrate and make good decisions.
exampleZh: 睡眠不足会严重影响你集中注意力和做出正确决策的能力。

example: We should utilize every available resource to solve this urgent environmental crisis effectively.
exampleZh: 我们应该利用一切可用资源有效解决这一紧迫的环境危机。

example: Despite her physical handicap, she became one of the most successful athletes in history.
exampleZh: 尽管身体有障碍，她仍然成为了历史上最成功的运动员之一。

example: He used a wooden spoon to stir the soup as it simmered on the stove.
exampleZh: 他用木勺搅拌在炉子上慢炖的汤。

example: The heavy rains caused the river to rise and submerge several houses along the bank.
exampleZh: 大雨导致河水上涨，淹没了沿岸的几所房屋。

example: The country's trade deficit has grown significantly over the past three consecutive quarters.
exampleZh: 该国的贸易逆差在过去连续三个季度中显著增长。

example: It is illegal for employers to discriminate against job applicants based on their age or gender.
exampleZh: 雇主基于年龄或性别歧视求职者是违法的。

example: The journalist was fired for trying to fabricate evidence to support his false story.
exampleZh: 这名记者因试图编造证据来支持他的虚假报道而被解雇。

example: She has a remarkable ability to articulate complex ideas in a simple and engaging way.
exampleZh: 她有一种非凡的能力，能以简单有趣的方式清楚表达复杂的思想。

example: The restaurant has built an excellent reputation for serving authentic and delicious local cuisine.
exampleZh: 这家餐厅因提供正宗美味的本地菜肴而建立了极好的声誉。

example: The movie received a huge amount of publicity before its worldwide release last summer.
exampleZh: 这部电影在去年夏天全球上映前获得了大量的宣传和关注。

example: A massive earthquake struck the coastal city and caused widespread destruction and loss of life.
exampleZh: 一场大地震袭击了这座沿海城市，造成了广泛的破坏和生命损失。

example: The factory plans to manufacture over a million units of the new product this year.
exampleZh: 该工厂计划今年生产超过一百万单位的新产品。

example: She has a deep affection for her grandmother, who raised her from a very young age.
exampleZh: 她对从小抚养她长大的祖母怀有深厚的感情。

example: Technology continues to advance at a pace that was unimaginable just a decade ago.
exampleZh: 技术继续以十年前无法想象的速度飞速前进。
